bugs_fixed: BUG#1: string whitespace trim in tokenizer
BUG#2: MULTISIG always false → n-of-k implemented
BUG#3: empty 0x hex literal → throws clear error
known_limitations: CHECKSIG always false (needs EC crypto, out of scope for mock)
PROOF always false (needs real MMR tree)
0X uppercase prefix not supported (Minima spec: 0x only)

blocker: GitHub connector has read:org + read:user scopes only — no repo write. Need repo scope.
user_action_needed: Re-authorize GitHub connector with repo scope, then say: push to github
